deptName: ช่างอากาศยาน
learningOutcomes:
Explain concept of basic Electrical Theory consist of typical terms about Electrical
terminology, Symbols, meaning of Capacitance, DC Motor/Generator and can be perform
functional test of aircraft DC Motor/Generator correctly. Be able to apply electricals principle
in aircraft Maintenance in radio electrical Instrument (REI) field. Have a good attitude to work
neatly, be patience with work, a habit of working carefully and safety.
objectives:
1. To provide the knowledge about the Electrical Knowledge, Electrical terminology,
Electrical Symbols, and safety precautions, and including, Capacitance, DC Motor/Generator
Theory and theory concerned with Safety awareness
2. To explain about the Electrical Knowledge, Electrical terminology, Electrical
Symbols, and safety precautions, and including, Capacitance, DC Motor/Generator Theory and
theory concerned with Safety awareness
3. Have good attitudes, and Habit Desirable while operating in the electrical tasks, the
troubleshooting with safety awareness.
4. Be able to apply the Electrical Theory to the assignment tasks.
Course Competency
1. Describe and codify knowledge about the properties of an Inductive, and Capacitive
Reactance.
2. Able to categories the Electrical types, and demonstrate the DC circuit correctly.
3. Perform aircraft electrical equipment’s, repairing, testing with the safety awareness.
4. Perform functional test of aircraft DC Motor/Generator correctly.
5. Demonstrate the electrical measuring equipment correctly.
6. Solve in the complex Electrical equations, and describe the electrical Terminology
correctly.
description:
To study and practice about Electron theory, Static Electricity and Conduction, Electrical
Terminology, Generation of Electricity, DC Sources of Electricity, DC Circuits, Resistance/Resistor that
consist of Resistance and affecting factors and Positive and negative temperature coefficient
conductance, Power, Capacitance/Capacitor and DC Motor/Generator Theory.
